authors: Mathias Bukh Vestergaard Department of Political Science
raw_title: A Credible Change: How Parties Use Election Promises to Counteract The Loss of Reputation When They Dilute Their Policy Positions
title_en: A Credible Change: How Parties Use Election Promises to Counteract The Loss of Reputation When They Dilute Their Policy Positions
title_zh: 可信的改变：政党如何在淡化政策立场时利用选举承诺来抵消声誉损失
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了政党在改变或淡化其政策立场时，如何通过选举承诺来维持或修复公众信任。当政党调整政策时，可能会失去支持者的信任，但研究发现，他们可以通过做出新的、具体的承诺来重新建立可信度。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how political parties use election promises to maintain or repair public trust when they change or dilute their policy positions. When parties adjust policies, they might lose supporters' trust, but the research finds they can rebuild credibility by making new, specific promises.
research_direction_zh: 研究政治传播中政党如何通过战略沟通工具（如选举承诺）来管理声誉和可信度，特别是在政策立场变化时。
research_direction_en: Investigating how political parties use strategic communication tools like election promises to manage reputation and credibility in political communication, especially during policy position changes.
